---
title: "Microplastics Bioindicators Data Exploration"
author: "Leah Thornton Hampton"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document: 
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    number_sections: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r}
#Setup

#Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(DT)

#Data Import

#Raw database
tomex2 <- read_csv(
  "Data/ToMEx_Search2026-03-04.csv",
  na = c("", "NA", "Na", "N/A", "--")
) |>
  clean_names(replace = c("μ" = "u"))

#Volume Aligned to Marine Sediment Alpha Values
tomex2_vol_marinesed <- read_csv(
  "Data/MarineSed_Vol_Count_ToMEx2.csv",
  na = c("", "NA", "Na", "N/A", "--")
) |>
  clean_names(replace = c("μ" = "u"))

#Volume Aligned to Marine Surface Water Alpha Values
tomex2_vol_marinewater <- read_csv(
  "Data/MarineWater_Vol_Count_ToMEx2.csv",
  na = c("", "NA", "Na", "N/A", "--")
) |>
  clean_names(replace = c("μ" = "u"))

```

# Select Relevant Toxicity Data

```{r}

#group data set by taxa most relevant to different classes of bioindicators

amphipod <- c(
    "Hyalella azteca",
    "Gammarus fossarum",
    "Echinogammarus marinus",
    "Gammarus pulex",
    "Gammarus duebeni",
    "Corophium volutator"
    )

bivalves <- c(
    "Mytilus galloprovincialis",
    "Abra nitida",
    "Ennucula tenuis",
    "Mytilus edulis",
    "Crassostrea gigas",
    "Pinctada margaritifera",
    "Ostrea edulis",
    "Dreissena polymorpha",
    "Sphaerium corneum",
    "Scrobicularia plana",
    "Perna viridis",
    "Corbicula fluminea",
    "Atactodea striata",
    "Anodonta anatina",
    "Dreissena bugensis",
    "Meretrix meretrix",
    "Mactra veneriformis",
    "Limecola balthica",
    "Mytilus coruscus"
  )

benthic_invert <- c(
  "Arenicola marina",
  "Abra nitida",
  "Ennucula tenuis",
  "Perinereis aibuhitensis",
  "Hediste diversicolor",
  "Amphiura filiformis",
  "Potamopyrgus antipodarum",
  "Corbicula fluminea",
  "Alitta virens",
  "Limecola balthica",
  "Corophium volutator"
)

plankton <- c(
  "Calanus helgolandicus",
  "Calanus finmarchicus",
  "Parvocalanus crassirostris",
  "Paracyclopina nana",
  "Acartia clausi",
  "Acartia tonsa",
  "Nitocra spinipes",
  "Brachionus plicatilis",
  "Brachionus koreanus",
  "Brachionus calyciflorus",
  "Brachionus fernandoi",
  "Moina macrocopa",
  "Diaphanosoma celebensis",
  "Raphidocelis subcapitata",
  "Scenedesmus obliquus",
  "Scenedesmus armatus",
  "Chlorella vulgaris",
  "Chlorella pyrenoidosa",
  "Dunaliella salina",
  "Dunaliella tertiolecta",
  "Tetraselmis chuii",
  "Chlamydomonas reinhardtii",
  "Chaetoceros neogracile",
  "Thalassiosira pseudonana",
  "Skeletonema costatum",
  "Heterocapsa triquetra",
  "Karenia mikimotoi",
  "Amphidinium carterae",
  "Gyrodinium sp.",
  "Protoperidinium bipes",
  "Strombidium sulcatum",
  "Oxyrrhis marina",
  "Microcystis aeruginosa",
  "Microcystis flos-aquae",
  "Chlorella NA",
  "Anabaena NA",
  "Spirulina NA",
  "Diatoms NA",
  "Microalgae NA",
  "Cyanobacteria NA"
)

taxa_lists <- list(
  amphipod = amphipod,
  bivalve = bivalves,
  benthic_invertebrate = benthic_invert,
  plankton = plankton
)

species_groups <- tibble::enframe(taxa_lists,
                                  name = "species_group",
                                  value = "species") %>%
  tidyr::unnest(species)

tomex2 <- tomex2 %>%
  left_join(species_groups, by = "species", relationship = "many-to-many") %>% 
  #only use data pertaining to species groups
  filter(!is.na(species_group))

tomex2_vol_marinesed <- tomex2_vol_marinesed %>%
  left_join(species_groups, by = "species", relationship = "many-to-many")%>% 
  #only use data pertaining to species groups
  filter(!is.na(species_group))

tomex2_vol_marinewater <- tomex2_vol_marinewater %>%
  left_join(species_groups, by = "species", relationship = "many-to-many")%>% 
  #only use data pertaining to species groups
  filter(!is.na(species_group))

```

What relevant toxicity data is in ToMEx 2.0?

```{r}

study_sum <- tomex2 %>% 
  # group_by(doi, species_group, species, environment) %>% 
  # summarise()
  
  
  filter(
         technical_red_criteria == "Red Criteria Passed",
         risk_assessment_red_criteria == "Red Criteria Passed",
         ) %>% 
  group_by(species_group, environment) %>% 
  summarise(study_count = n_distinct(doi), species_count = n_distinct(species))

datatable(study_sum)


tomex2 <- tomex2 %>% 
  filter(
         technical_red_criteria == "Red Criteria Passed",
         risk_assessment_red_criteria == "Red Criteria Passed",
         )  
```

```{r}

# Count polymers
polymer_pct <- tomex2 %>%
  group_by(species_group, polymer) %>%
  summarise(count = n_distinct(doi), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(species_group) %>%
  mutate(percent = round(100 * count / sum(count), 1)) %>%
  select(-count) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = polymer, values_from = percent, values_fill = 0)

# Count shapes
shape_pct <- tomex2 %>%
  group_by(species_group, shape) %>%
  summarise(count = n_distinct(doi), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(species_group) %>%
  mutate(percent = round(100 * count / sum(count), 1)) %>%
  select(-count) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = shape, values_from = percent, values_fill = 0)

length_summary <- tomex2 %>%
  group_by(species_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_length_um = mean(particle_length_um, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_length_um = sd(particle_length_um, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_length_um = min(particle_length_um, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_length_um = max(particle_length_um, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

compact_summary <- length_summary %>%
  left_join(polymer_pct, by = "species_group") %>%
  left_join(shape_pct, by = "species_group") %>%
  arrange(species_group) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 1)))

datatable(
  compact_summary,
  rownames = FALSE,
  options = list(
    pageLength = 10,      # number of rows per page
    autoWidth = TRUE,     # auto-adjust column widths
    scrollX = TRUE        # enable horizontal scroll
  ),
  class = 'stripe hover compact'  # optional styling
)

```

```{r}

size <- tomex2 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(particle_length_um)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = particle_length_um)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 25, fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ species_group, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Particle Length Distribution by Organism Group",
    x = "Particle Length (µm)",
    y = "Count"
  )

plot(size)

```
```{r}

polymer <- tomex2 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(polymer)) %>%   # remove NAs
  group_by(species_group, polymer) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = species_group, y = n, fill = polymer))+
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity")

polymer

```

```{r}

shape <- tomex2 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(shape)) %>%   # remove NAs
  group_by(species_group, shape) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = species_group, y = n, fill = shape))+
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity")

shape

```

```{r}

tox_summary <- tomex2 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(species_group)) %>% 
  filter(
    level_of_biological_organization %in% c("Organism", "Population", "Community"),
    !is.na(effect_metric),
    exposure_route == "water",
    ) %>% 
  select(doi, species, species_group, level_of_biological_organization, broad_endpoint_category, specific_endpoint_category, effect_metric, 
         ends_with("_master")) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with("master"),
    names_to = "dose_metric",
    values_to = "dose",
    values_drop_na = TRUE
  ) 
  
tox_summary_plot <- tox_summary %>% 
  filter(effect_metric != "HONEC") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = species_group, y = dose, colour = effect_metric))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  facet_wrap(~dose_metric, scales="free")+
  scale_y_log10()

tox_summary_plot
```

```{r}

tox_summary <- tomex2_vol_marinesed %>%
  filter(
    level_of_biological_organization %in% c("Organism", "Population", "Community"),
    !is.na(effect_metric),
    exposure_route == "water"
    ) %>% 
  select(doi, species, species_group, level_of_biological_organization, broad_endpoint_category, specific_endpoint_category, effect_metric, 
         plotted_dose_values) 
  
tox_summary_plot <- tox_summary %>% 
  filter(effect_metric != "HONEC") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = species_group, y = plotted_dose_values, colour = effect_metric))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  # facet_wrap(~dose_metric, scales="free")+
  scale_y_log10()

tox_summary_plot

```
```{r}

tox_summary <- tomex2_vol_marinewater %>%
  filter(
    # environment == "Marine",
    level_of_biological_organization %in% c("Organism", "Population", "Community"),
    !is.na(effect_metric),
    exposure_route == "water"
    ) %>% 
  select(doi, species, species_group, level_of_biological_organization, broad_endpoint_category, specific_endpoint_category, effect_metric, 
         plotted_dose_values) 
  
tox_summary_plot <- tox_summary %>% 
  filter(effect_metric != "HONEC") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = species_group, y = plotted_dose_values, fill = effect_metric))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  # facet_wrap(~dose_metric, scales="free")+
  scale_y_log10()+
  labs(y = "Particles/mL (Volume Aligned)", x = "Species Group", fill = "Effect Metric")+
  theme_minimal()

tox_summary_plot

```
